summary: Completed frontend-only testing of Estate Tea cinematic landing flow on desktop + mobile and admin dashboard access. All 7 requested test scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: EntryForm.jsx (~290 lines) is well-scoped; TeaGrainTransition is a clean self-contained sub-component.

Logo and video assets load from emergentagent.com CDN as expected. Video element receives correct src URL but headless playback failure is gracefully handled by the timing-based phase transitions (logo→video→button via setTimeout), so UX is not blocked.
Location detection is started in handleGetStarted (parallel with transition) - good UX. handleGetLocation safely no-ops when navigator.geolocation is unavailable.

Form validates empty name with toast.error - good. data-testid attributes are present on all critical interactive elements (hero-section, get-started-button, form-section, name-input, entry-submit-button, location-detecting, location-detected).

Admin route via window.location.hash === '#admin' works correctly. Login uses password (WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26) on client side - typical for low-security admin gates but note this is not real auth; anyone reading the JS bundle can find the password. Consider moving admin auth server-side if higher security required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified the cinematic landing flow end-to-end: 1) Logo fade-in (opacity 1 at ~1s), 2) Video element in DOM with correct src https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_tea-estate-store/artifacts/z2zc6gmx_opening%20page.mp4, 3) GET STARTED button appears ~4.5s, 4) Click triggers 80 falling tea-grain particle elements (z-[200] fixed overlay), 5) Entry form appears ~2.2s later with logo, gold 'Welcome' heading, 'PREMIUM TEA EXPERIENCE' subtitle, 'YOUR NAME' label, name input, ENTER STORE button, 6) Submitting transitions to WelcomeScreen showing 'Welcome' + user name. Mobile (375x812) has zero horizontal overflow on hero/form/welcome. Admin login at /#admin with password WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 succeeds and shows Products/Reviews/Orders tabs.

features_tested.logo_fade_in_out_on_landing: PASS - Logo opacity 1 during visible phase, hero-section testid present
features_tested.video_phase_with_correct_src_and_button_: PASS - Video src matches expected URL; GET STARTED button visible after ~4.5s
features_tested.tea_grain_particle_animation_on_click: PASS - 80 brownish particle divs appear in z-[200] overlay after clicking GET STARTED
features_tested.entry_form_appears_with_all_elements: PASS - Logo, Welcome heading (gold), PREMIUM TEA EXPERIENCE subtitle, YOUR NAME label, name-input, ENTER STORE button all present
features_tested.welcome_screen_with_user_name: PASS - After form submit, Welcome screen shows 'Welcome' + 'TestUser'
features_tested.mobile_responsive_375x812: PASS - No horizontal overflow on hero (375=375), form (375=375), or welcome (375=375) screens
features_tested.admin_dashboard_at_hash_admin: PASS - /#admin shows Admin Panel login; password WEUSEDTOBECALLEDHAMLETTEA26 grants access to Products/Reviews/Orders dashboard
